titleStmt.title: SII 27.411: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 411. (A.R. No. 522 of 1928-29.) NELLIKARA, KERAL TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the east verandah of the prākāra of the Anantanātha-basti.
This record is dated Śaka 1447, Tāraṇa, Dhanus 15, Sunday. The details given are irregular, to 1524 A.D., December 13 when the weekday was Tuesday.
It register a gift of paddy from the land presented by her younger brother Dēvaṁṇarasa alias Komtu, to the basti at Kāyaravura, by Śaṁkara-dēvi. Dēvara-senabōva wrote the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śālivāhana śakhavaru
ṣa 1447 neya vartamāna tāraṇa
saṁvatsarada dhanurmāsa 15 ne Ādi
vāradaṁdū dēvaṁṇarasarāda koṁ
tu taṁma Akka śaṁkharadēviyarige
dharmma veccakke biṭṭa tāu pātradu
vina hadaḍeyabāḷinalli baha baṭṭi
ya bhta ba 30 le mu 60 nū ka śaṁkha
radēviyaru kāyaravurada bastiya
dēvapūjegū Āhāradānakkū biṭṭu
koṭṭa bhta �yo māḍida dharṁmakke sākṣi
Uḷiyattava nānaṁda koṭyaṇa seṭṭi
koṁtu Āḷuva koṁtaṇa yiṁtivara
sākṣi dēvaṁṇara sākṣi Oppa yī śāsana ha
ridavarige Uḷughaṭṭadalli yiḷiva kavile
ya koṁda pāpa gaṁgātīradalli brāṁhmaṇa
na vadhe māḍidadōṣa bastidēvālyaAḷisida
vaṁ vi va vaṇege sāryya caṁdrara
sākṣi dēvara sōnabōvana bara
Digital edition of SII 27.411 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
